hero.name: MUSKAN DHAMURIA
hero.tagline: Information Systems Student | Product Development & Cybersecurity
hero.description: Building innovative solutions at the intersection of technology and user experience. Passionate about full stack development, data analytics, and cybersecurity.

featuredProjects.title: Questpass
featuredProjects.description: QuestPass is a fair-access presale platform designed to combat ticket scalping and bot abuse. Instead of selling tickets, QuestPass integrates with official ticketing partners and allows fans to earn presale access by completing engagement-based quests such as music trivia, listening history verification, and mini-games.

highlights: Achieved Higher Distinction for the project
Built loyalty system for artists and genuine fans

featuredProjects.title: Web Vulnerability Scanner
featuredProjects.description: Automatically detects common security flaws such as SQL Injection, reflected XSS, and missing HTTP security headers. The tool uses a BFS-based crawler to explore web applications, test inputs in forms and parameters, and identify vulnerabilities with a risk-based scoring system (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW). It includes features like rate limiting, stealth headers, and duplicate URL handling to simulate realistic scanning behavior, and generates detailed reports in JSON, HTML, and CSV formats for analysis.

featuredProjects.title: Urbanix
featuredProjects.description: Implemented multi-objective optimization logic and Pareto frontier analysis to simulate and evaluate urban policy bundles. Developed data ingestion and transformation pipeline for Excel-based urban datasets and real-time visualization dashboards.

highlights: Most Feasible Solution at Hack For Cities Hackathon 2026

featuredProjects.title: Housing Price Analysis Singapore
featuredProjects.description: In-depth analysis of residential property prices examining location, flat type, and amenities

highlights: Achieved Higher Distinction for the project

featuredProjects.title: Koryori Hayashi
featuredProjects.description: Multi pronged solution to enable digital transformation for a local restaurant, including a customer-facing website with online ordering, a data analytics dashboard for sales insights with pricing and inventory management, a digital loyalty program, a social media marketing strategy, queue and table management system and a digital twin.

highlights: Implemented data-driven solutions for restaurant digital transformation

featuredProjects.title: PixelPop
featuredProjects.description: A responsive web-based Game Platform that showcases mini-games I have built.

featuredProjects.title: SNAPEE!
featuredProjects.description: My team and I applied a full iterative, human-centred design process across multipledevelopment cycles. We conducted user research and empathy analysis to understand the challenges faced by busy students, translated insights into clear functional and usability requirements, and developed a low-fidelity prototype of the app's UI. We then performed a heuristic evaluation to assess usability, identify design flaws, and refine navigation, layout, and feature clarity. We also enhanced the prototype into a more refined design, incorporating structured feedback and usability testing through planned A/B experiments. We analysed results using the Mann-Whitney U Test to improve user flow, accessibility, and overall interaction design, while documenting design decisions and progress throughout.

workExperience.title: RPA Software Engineer Intern
workExperience.description: Designed and implemented RPA scripts using .NET, JavaScript, and HTML, focusing on modular logic, error handling, and performance optimization. Engineered automation solutions using Automation Anywhere to replace manual workflows with scalable, code-driven processes. Integrated automation workflows with existing systems, debugged and resolved runtime issues, and contributed to improving system reliability and efficiency through structured testing and iteration.

highlights: Focus on conceptual understanding and application
Organized detailed records of tutoring sessions
Tracked and reported student progress effectively

workExperience.title: Tech Intern
workExperience.description: Developed interactive digital learning solutions for STEM education programmes, including a web-based “Young Engineer Trail” that tracked student progress and badge completion through dynamic quizzes, and an online course platform for the Young Digital Fabricator programme covering multiple modules. Translated educational content into structured, user-friendly digital workflows, and ensured smooth delivery under tight timelines by independently managing development and presenting the final solution.

highlights: Developed 'Young Engineer Trail' for primary students
Created online modules for 'Young Digital Fabricator' badge
Led final presentation after teammate withdrawal
Ensured on-time project completion under pressure
